name: Workshop B03 · Barista Incidents Playground
brief: Playground for ALDC coding agents · Workshop V-Valley 2026 · Bloque 03
description: Per-Tenant Extension used as hands-on playground during Bloque 03 of the Workshop ALDC V-Valley 2026. Includes business context for the Barista Incidents case study. The .github/ folder ships with ALDC already installed — use it as the starting point for architect + spec.create exercises.
